trivia: The glass-cockpit MD-80 was Delta's short-haul icon for thirty years. Retirement came suddenly in 2020, and active examples are now vanishingly rare.
Any MD-88 hit today deserves investigation: the survivors are scattered, few, and full of stories.
funFacts: Delta was the definitive operator until 2020.
Added EFIS displays to the classic MD-80 airframe.
